data_sources: AQUALOC public underwater ROV localization dataset
GPLA-12 public pipeline acoustic leakage dataset

calibration_sources.use: navigation vibration, acceleration scale, turn/gyro events, pressure/flow context

calibration_sources.source: AQUALOC public underwater ROV localization dataset
calibration_sources.use: underwater IMU and pressure timing patterns

calibration_sources.source: GPLA-12 public pipeline acoustic leakage dataset

calibration_sources.use: hydrophone-style background and false-positive noise profile
pipe graph, intersections, pressure/flow context, leak scenario placement

steady_travel.imu: low-amplitude vibration around gravity with small gyro drift
steady_travel.evidence: accel_mag stable, gyro_mag low, forward distance increasing

intersection.source: WNTR network node + SubPipe/AQUALOC turn calibration
intersection.imu: gyro_z rise and heading change near a mapped branch node
intersection.acoustic: optional short flow disturbance; not treated as proof by itself
intersection.evidence: known pipe graph node plus IMU turn pattern

impact.evidence: acceleration spike plus tether tension rise

leak.source: GPLA-12 acoustic leakage calibration + WNTR pressure/flow context
leak.acoustic: raised RMS with stronger high-frequency bandpower and sustained leak score
leak.hydraulic: local pressure dip and flow increase in the pipe model
leak.evidence: high acoustic leak score, pressure/flow anomaly, no impact/tether artifact

tether.reel: tether tension and payout speed used to reject false leak positives
tether.evidence: tension spike without matching sustained acoustic leak signature

provenance_note: Dataset-calibrated replay: motion, IMU, hydrophone, pressure, and flow behavior are calibrated from public underwater robot and acoustic datasets. Pipe geometry, tether, and event placement are modeled until PipeOwl hardware test-loop logs replace each stream.
mode_limitations: Not collected by a PipeOwl robot yet
No public dataset currently contains in-pipe hydrophone, IMU, tether, and leak truth together
Intersections are identified by map/IMU fusion, not hydrophone frequency alone
